one_time_description: Vanier Development revenue of $5,011,515 with corresponding expenses of $4,725,066 - appears to be a new/one-time development project not in prior year
economic_notes: Operates Pabineau Seafood Market and Takeout, Pabineau Gas Bar and Tobacco Shop, Pabineau Trucking, and Vanier Development. Investment in Oinpegitjoig Wind GP Ltd. (wind energy profit share). Long-term debt of $9,000,000 obtained in 2024.
notes: Vanier Development is a new consolidated entity in 2024 with $5,011,515 revenue and $4,725,066 expenses (not present in 2023). Proceeds from new long-term debt of $9,000,000 obtained during 2024. Trust funds held by Federal Government of $65,952 treated as restricted cash. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $4,289,588 + CMHC $2,601,231 + DFO $877,006 + Health Canada $516,288 = $8,284,113. Remuneration schedules referenced on pages 38-39 but not visible in provided images. Enterprises expenses total includes Gas Bar $2,919,446 + Seafood $372,334 + Trucking $518,409 + Vanier $4,725,066 = $8,535,255 plus community job creation $78,742.
